why.title: Neurological Expertise You Can Trust
why.specialist_desc: Only ~4% of PTs hold the NCS certification — the gold standard in neurologic rehabilitation.
why.oneonone_desc: Every session is led directly by Dr. Ellen — no assistants, no shortcuts, ever.
why.technology_desc: NeuroCom Balance Master and OMNIAX rotational chair for precise diagnosis and individualized care.
why.trilingual_desc: Services in English, Portuguese, and Spanish — serving Orlando's diverse community.
why.telehealth_desc: Virtual sessions for follow-ups and home exercise program guidance.
why.aquatic_desc: Water-based neurological rehabilitation — gentle, effective, and uniquely beneficial.

process.title: Your Path to Recovery
process.s1_desc: Schedule your initial 60–90 min comprehensive neurological assessment.
process.s2_desc: Get a personalized, evidence-based treatment plan tailored to your condition and goals.
process.s3_desc: Work 1:1 with Dr. Ellen and track measurable progress toward recovery.

insurance.question: Not sure about your coverage?

about.title: Ellen Cristina Souza Teixeira
about.tagline: Senior Physical Therapist — Neurologic & Vestibular Rehabilitation
about.story: With over 20 years dedicated exclusively to neurological and vestibular rehabilitation, Dr. Ellen Teixeira has helped hundreds of patients reclaim their independence, mobility, and quality of life. Originally from Brazil, she built her career across two countries before founding Vitality Neuro Rehab in the Orlando area — to serve a diverse, multilingual community with the highest standard of specialized neurological care.
about.story2: Dr. Ellen holds a Doctorate in Physical Therapy (DPT) with a perfect 4.0 GPA from The College of St. Scholastica, and is one of the few clinicians in the region to hold the prestigious Board-Certified Neurologic Clinical Specialist (NCS) credential — held by less than 4% of physical therapists in the U.S.
about.story3: She specializes in complex conditions including stroke, Parkinson's disease, multiple sclerosis, traumatic brain injury, and vestibular disorders — using advanced technology including the NeuroCom Balance Master and OMNIAX rotational chair for precise, individualized care.
about.philosophy: "I believe every patient's nervous system has the capacity to change. Through neuroplasticity-driven, evidence-based therapy — delivered with compassion and consistency — real recovery is possible, no matter where you are in your journey."
about.edu_dpt_school: The College of St. Scholastica, MN · 2023
about.edu_geriatrics_school: Federal University of Minas Gerais (UFMG), Brazil · 2006
about.exp1_company: AdventHealth Sports Med & Rehab – Celebration, FL

services.title: Specialized Neurological Rehabilitation
services.subtitle: Every service is delivered 1:1 by Dr. Ellen — evidence-based, technology-assisted, and tailored to your unique recovery.
services.neuro_desc: Comprehensive assessment and individualized treatment for all neurological conditions, built on neuroplasticity principles and measurable functional outcomes.
services.vestibular_desc: Advanced vestibular and oculomotor assessment using the OMNIAX rotational chair, followed by evidence-based treatment for dizziness and balance disorders.
services.balance_desc: NeuroCom Balance Master-assisted assessment followed by individualized training to reduce fall risk and build walking confidence.
services.concussion_desc: Comprehensive post-concussion rehabilitation addressing dizziness, headaches, cognitive fatigue, and return-to-activity protocols.
services.facial_desc: Specialized neuromuscular retraining and recovery optimization for facial nerve dysfunction.
services.aquatic_desc: Water-based rehabilitation using buoyancy and resistance — ideal for patients with limited mobility due to neurological conditions.
services.telehealth_desc: Remote sessions for follow-ups, home exercise guidance, and consultations in English, Portuguese, or Spanish.

conditions.title: Expert Care for Complex Neurological Conditions
conditions.subtitle: Dr. Ellen specializes exclusively in neurological rehabilitation. If it affects the brain, nervous system, or inner ear — we treat it.
conditions.stroke_desc: Regain movement, strength, and independence with neuroplasticity-driven therapy after a stroke.
conditions.parkinsons_desc: Targeted movement therapy, gait training, and evidence-based protocols to manage symptoms and improve daily life.
conditions.ms_desc: Individualized programs for fatigue management, functional maintenance, and neurological preservation.
conditions.tbi_desc: Rehabilitation for motor, balance, and vestibular deficits following mild to severe brain injury.
conditions.vestibular_desc: Advanced OMNIAX-assisted diagnosis and treatment for BPPV, vestibular hypofunction, PPPD, and chronic dizziness.
conditions.concussion_desc: Evidence-based return-to-activity protocols addressing all concussion symptoms.
conditions.bpd_desc: Neuromuscular retraining to restore facial movement and symmetry.
conditions.balance_desc: Comprehensive fall risk assessment and targeted training to build confidence and prevent future falls.

contact.title: Start Your Recovery Journey
contact.subtitle: Ready to take the first step? Book your evaluation or send us a message — we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.success_desc: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.referring_desc: We accept referrals from neurologists, ENT physicians, primary care, and other specialists. We aim to see your patient within 48 hours.
